raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves left ahead but WP80 lookahead shows delta=-27° requiring moderate right correction; maintaining speed 1.5 with -15° steering to follow the westward curving line.
knowledge: Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn
Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation
Near WP72-80, track runs nearly due west with small deltas
Speed 1.5 safe on straight/gentle curve sections
Car is slightly left of center (~0.08m) but all wheels on track
Heading near 166° corresponds to west-northwest travel
When target WP is behind car (bearing ~180° from heading), use further lookahead WP
WP78 tends to be behind car at this heading; WP80 gives better lookahead
Oversteer warning: avoid excessive correction when near track center
raw_action_dict.waypoint_analysis: Target WP80 at (2.429, 4.498): dy=0.079, dx=-0.090, bearing=138.9°, delta=-27.3° → steer right with -15°
